result.stderr:
GraphQL C# Client Generator Console App 1.0.7
Alex Butenko, Jan Hucka

  -o, --outputPath           Required. Output path; include file name for single
                             file output type; folder name for one class per
                             file output type

  -n, --namespace            Required. Root namespace all classes and other
                             members are generated to

  -u, --serviceUrl           GraphQL service URL used for retrieving schema
                             metadata

  -s, --schemaFileName       Path to schema metadata file in JSON format

  --header                   Format: {Header}:{Value}; allows to enter custom
                             headers required to fetch GraphQL metadata

  --classPrefix              Class prefix; value "Test" extends class name to
                             "TestTypeName"

  --classSuffix              Class suffix, for instance for version control;
                             value "V2" extends class name to "TypeNameV2"

  --csharpVersion            C# version compatibility; allowed values:
                             Compatible (default), Newest,
                             NewestWithNullableReferences

  --memberAccessibility      Class and interface access level; allowed values:
                             Public (default), Internal

  --outputType               Specifies generated classes organization; allowed
                             values: SingleFile (default), OneClassPerFile

  --partialClasses           Mark classes as "partial"

  --classMapping             Format: {GraphQlTypeName}:{C#ClassName}; allows to
                             define custom class names for specific GraphQL
                             types; common reason for this is to avoid property
                             of the same name as its parent class

  --idTypeMapping            Specifies the .NET type generated for GraphQL ID
                             data type; allowed values: Guid (default), String,
                             Object

  --floatTypeMapping         Specifies the .NET type generated for GraphQL Float
                             data type; allowed values: Decimal (default),
                             Double, Float

  --jsonPropertyAttribute    Specifies the condition for using
                             "JsonPropertyAttribute"; allowed values:
                             CaseInsensitive (default), CaseSensitive, Always,
                             Never, UseDefaultAlias

  --help                     Display this help screen.

  --version                  Display version information.
